question: Find all the services that has been used by the customer with details "Hardy Kutch".
sql: SELECT DISTINCT Services.Service_ID, Services.Service_Details FROM Customers JOIN Customers_and_Services ON Customers.Customer_ID = Customers_and_Services.Customer_ID JOIN Services ON Customers_and_Services.Service_ID = Services.Service_ID WHERE Customers.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch';

back_translation.intent: 查询特定客户的服务信息

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求查询客户'Hardy Kutch'使用的所有服务，SQL描述中通过Customers表的Customer_Details字段进行过滤，并关联获取Services表的Service_ID和Service_Details，符合原始问题的意图。
